sql_array: CREATE TABLE phrases (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, phrase_text VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO phrases (phrase_text) VALUES ('initial phrase'), (NULL), (''), ('another phrase with boundary value $%&*'), ('paid ads');
SELECT * FROM phrases WHERE phrase_text IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC;
SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD((SELECT phrase_text FROM phrases WHERE id = 1), NULL, NULL, NULL, 'Test phrase', 'replacing', 'dba', 'dba');
SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD((SELECT NULL), NULL, NULL, NULL, (SELECT phrase_text FROM phrases WHERE phrase_text = 'paid ads'), 'replacing', 'dba', 'dba');

SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD('max length phrase.......................................................................', NULL, NULL, NULL, 'some replacement text with edge cases', 'replacing', 'dba', 'dba');
SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD((SELECT phrase_text FROM phrases WHERE phrase_text LIKE '%phrase%'), NULL, NULL, NULL, 'replacement with special char @#$', 'replacing', 'dba', 'dba');
SELECT * FROM (SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD(phrase_text, NULL, NULL, NULL, phrase_text || ' updated', 'replacing', 'dba', 'dba') AS new_id FROM phrases) subquery HAVING new_id > 0;
SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD(phrase_text, NULL, NULL, (SELECT MAX(id) FROM phrases), 'dynamic phrase add', 'replacing', 'dba', 'dba') FROM phrases WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM phrases);
SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD('another test', NULL, NULL, NULL, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM phrases) > 0 THEN 'non-empty' ELSE 'empty' END, 'replacing', 'dba', 'dba');
SELECT DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD('Mixed type: ' || (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM phrases), NULL, NULL, NULL, CAST(12345 AS VARCHAR), 'replacing', 'dba', 'dba');
INSERT INTO phrases (phrase_text) VALUES (DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD('insert phrase during func', NULL, NULL, NULL, 'inserted phrase', 'replacing', 'dba', 'dba'));
